title: Rent the Intelligence, Own the Workflow
big_statement: Succeeding with multi-agent pipelines dressed up for human interaction

title: The Tempting Non-Answer
bullets: Wrap a chat window, ship it, done
Usage: a novelty spike that decayed
Outputs inconsistent, cost per use unknown
Experts quietly revert to doing it by hand

title: The Failure Is Structural
big_statement: Chat is an interface, not a strategy

title: The Pattern: Five Properties
bullets: Narrow agents, human-legible artifacts, revision, visible cost, real checkpoints

title: Agentic Pain Relief
bullets: Buttons, cards, players — never prompts
A progress strip with four lights
The interface absorbs the AI pain

title: A Working Demonstration
bullets: URL or PDF in, finished media out
Five stages: extract, script, deck, voice, render

title: Self-Hosting, and Cheap
big_statement: This deck cost less than a cup of coffee — and the system shows the receipt

title: Creation: Intent, Not Prompts
bullets: Audience in a sentence
Personality in a sentence
Formats picked from a menu

title: Slides as Inspectable Cards
bullets: Each anchored to a narration line
Timing and visual shown
Asset inventory accounts for everything

title: Judgment Where It's Cheap
bullets: Step through slide by slide
Hear the exact narration
Real authority to send it back

title: The Cost-of-Correction Asymmetry
bullets: Error cost grows with every stage it survives
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>@keyframes grow{from{transform:scaleY(0)}to{transform:scaleY(1)}}.bar{transform-origin:0 520px;animation:grow .9s ease-out both}.b2{animation-delay:.2s}.b3{animation-delay:.4s}.b4{animation-delay:.6s}@keyframes fin{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}.lbl{animation:fin .5s ease-out both;animation-delay:.9s}</style><line x1="80" y1="520" x2="940" y2="520" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/><rect class="bar" x="120" y="460" width="130" height="60" fill="#7a5a24"/><rect class="bar b2" x="320" y="370" width="130" height="150" fill="#b07a2e"/><rect class="bar b3" x="520" y="260" width="130" height="260" fill="#d4922f"/><rect class="bar b4" x="720" y="150" width="130" height="370" fill="#e8a13c"/><g font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#9aa0ab" text-anchor="middle"><text x="185" y="555">Script</text><text x="385" y="555">Deck</text><text x="585" y="555">Voice</text><text x="785" y="555">Video</text></g><g class="lbl" font-family="sans-serif"><text x="185" y="440" text-anchor="middle" font-size="24" fill="#f2f0eb">cents</text><text x="785" y="128" text-anchor="middle" font-size="24" fill="#f2f0eb">real money & patience</text></g></svg>

title: What to Own, What to Rent
bullets: Rent the model. Own everything around it
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}.p{animation:fadeUp .6s ease-out both}.pd{animation-delay:.3s}.r{animation:fadeUp .5s ease-out both}.r1{animation-delay:.5s}.r2{animation-delay:.65s}.r3{animation-delay:.8s}.r4{animation-delay:.95s}</style><g class="p"><rect x="60" y="120" width="370" height="400" rx="12" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="245" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="bold" fill="#9aa0ab">RENT</text><rect x="110" y="290" width="270" height="90" rx="10" fill="#e8a13c"/><text x="245" y="345" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="bold" fill="#1e222a">The intelligence</text><text x="245" y="440" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="22" fill="#9aa0ab">Upgrading = a config line</text></g><g class="p pd"><rect x="570" y="120" width="370" height="400" rx="12" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><text x="755" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="bold" fill="#e8a13c">OWN</text></g><g font-family="sans-serif" font-size="25" fill="#f2f0eb"><text class="r r1" x="610" y="250">• Decomposition</text><text class="r r2" x="610" y="320">• Artifacts</text><text class="r r3" x="610" y="390">• Verification</text><text class="r r4" x="610" y="460">• Economics</text></g></svg>

title: The One Sentence
big_statement: Rent the intelligence. Own the workflow.

title: Pitfall: Fake Agentics
bullets: A hard-coded chart wore an AI costume
Ships fine, demos fine, then dies quietly
Cure: the model designs, the code enforces

title: The Demo Plateau
big_statement: The product is the revision loop

title: Pitfalls & Cures
bullets: Five ways these systems quietly fail
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}}.row{animation:fadeIn .5s ease-out both}.r1{animation-delay:.1s}.r2{animation-delay:.25s}.r3{animation-delay:.4s}.r4{animation-delay:.55s}.r5{animation-delay:.7s}</style><g font-family="sans-serif"><text x="60" y="70" font-size="24" fill="#9aa0ab">PITFALL</text><text x="560" y="70" font-size="24" fill="#e8a13c">CURE</text><line x1="60" y1="90" x2="940" y2="90" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><g class="row r1"><text x="60" y="150" font-size="25" fill="#f2f0eb">Fake agentics</text><text x="560" y="150" font-size="25" fill="#e8a13c">Model designs, code enforces</text></g><g class="row r2"><text x="60" y="235" font-size="25" fill="#f2f0eb">Demo plateau</text><text x="560" y="235" font-size="25" fill="#e8a13c">Revision as first-class op</text></g><g class="row r3"><text x="60" y="320" font-size="25" fill="#f2f0eb">Verification theatre</text><text x="560" y="320" font-size="25" fill="#e8a13c">Best judgment at checkpoints</text></g><g class="row r4"><text x="60" y="405" font-size="25" fill="#f2f0eb">Invisible economics</text><text x="560" y="405" font-size="25" fill="#e8a13c">Meter & surface every artifact</text></g><g class="row r5"><text x="60" y="490" font-size="25" fill="#f2f0eb">Silent drift</text><text x="560" y="490" font-size="25" fill="#e8a13c">Dependency & staleness tracking</text></g><line x1="60" y1="180" x2="940" y2="180" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15"/><line x1="60" y1="265" x2="940" y2="265" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15"/><line x1="60" y1="350" x2="940" y2="350" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15"/><line x1="60" y1="435" x2="940" y2="435" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15"/></g></svg>

title: Translating the Pattern
big_statement: Find the assembly line inside the knowledge work

title: The Shape Repeats Across Domains
bullets: Every expert workflow is already staged
figure_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 620" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}.rw{animation:fadeIn .5s ease-out both}.d1{animation-delay:.1s}.d2{animation-delay:.25s}.d3{animation-delay:.4s}.d4{animation-delay:.55s}.d5{animation-delay:.7s}</style><g font-family="sans-serif"><text x="50" y="70" font-size="22" fill="#9aa0ab">DOMAIN</text><text x="310" y="70" font-size="22" fill="#9aa0ab">stage 1 → stage 2 → stage 3 → stage 4</text><line x1="50" y1="88" x2="960" y2="88" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><g class="rw d1"><text x="50" y="150" font-size="24" fill="#e8a13c">Insurance</text><text x="310" y="150" font-size="22" fill="#f2f0eb">intake · assessment · decision · letter</text></g><g class="rw d2"><text x="50" y="235" font-size="24" fill="#e8a13c">Legal</text><text x="310" y="235" font-size="22" fill="#f2f0eb">memo · clauses · risk register · agreement</text></g><g class="rw d3"><text x="50" y="320" font-size="24" fill="#e8a13c">Clinical</text><text x="310" y="320" font-size="22" fill="#f2f0eb">transcript · note · coding · summary</text></g><g class="rw d4"><text x="50" y="405" font-size="24" fill="#e8a13c">Software</text><text x="310" y="405" font-size="22" fill="#f2f0eb">spec · design · implementation · review</text></g><g class="rw d5"><text x="50" y="490" font-size="24" fill="#e8a13c">Marketing</text><text x="310" y="490" font-size="22" fill="#f2f0eb">brief · narrative · variants · packaging</text></g><line x1="50" y1="180" x2="960" y2="180" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15"/><line x1="50" y1="265" x2="960" y2="265" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15"/><line x1="50" y1="350" x2="960" y2="350" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15"/><line x1="50" y1="435" x2="960" y2="435" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15"/></g></svg>

title: How to Start
bullets: Draft-deliverable, bounded blast-radius workflow
Pair: domain expert + engineer
Days, not quarters, to first demo
Measure cost, revisions, expert minutes

title: The Moat Was Never the Model
big_statement: The intelligence was rented. The workflow — that is yours to build.
